offer: For restaurant finance managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient approvals cause late payments to vendors. We streamline the approval process instead of manual approval processes via email and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient vendor invoice approval process leading to delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant finance managers
Indie Hackers discussions on invoice approval workflows
DM outreach to restaurant finance managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for finance managers
try_it: Let users try manual invoice submission and status tracking for approvals on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
